introSection: Desert Race is an Intamin launched roller coaster located at Heide Park in Soltau, Lower Saxony, Germany. The train launches to in 2.4 seconds.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Desert Race opened on 15 May 2007 following an annual passholder's preview the day before.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Desert Race has black track and sand-coloured supports. It is nearly identical to Rita, which opened in 2005 at Alton Towers in the United Kingdom. The only differences are slightly different statistics and a slightly different brake run at the end.

fullText:
Desert Race is an Intamin launched roller coaster located at Heide Park in Soltau, Lower Saxony, Germany. The train launches to in 2.4 seconds.

Desert Race opened on 15 May 2007 following an annual passholder's preview the day before.

Desert Race has black track and sand-coloured supports. It is nearly identical to Rita, which opened in 2005 at Alton Towers in the United Kingdom. The only differences are slightly different statistics and a slightly different brake run at the end.
